title: rubus idaeus var. subinermis
intro: Rubus idaeus var. subinermis, also known as the thornless raspberry, is a variety of the red raspberry plant that lacks the thorns characteristic of the species. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus idaeus var. subinermis include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system, due to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and polyphenols. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
